example: She is able to speak three languages.
exampleZh: 她能說三種語言。
explanation: Having the skill or means to do something.

mistake.correct: be able to + V (正確)

example: The temperature is above 30 degrees today.
exampleZh: 今天氣溫超過30度。
explanation: At a higher level or position than something.

mistake.correct: above + N (不加of)

example: She walked across the street carefully.
exampleZh: 她小心地穿越街道。
explanation: From one side to the other of something.

mistake.correct: across + N (不加of)

chinese: v. 行動；表演 n. 行為
example: We must act quickly to solve this problem.
exampleZh: 我們必須迅速行動解決這個問題。
explanation: To do something or perform in a play.

mistake.correct: act quickly / act on something (採取行動)

chinese: n. 年齡；時代 v. 變老
example: What is your age?
exampleZh: 你幾歲？
explanation: The number of years someone has lived.

mistake.wrong: How old is your age? (重複)
mistake.correct: How old are you? / What is your age? (正確)

example: I met her two years ago.
exampleZh: 我兩年前認識她。
explanation: Back in time from the present.

mistake.correct: two years ago (直接用)

example: Look ahead before crossing the road.
exampleZh: 過馬路前先向前看。
explanation: In front or in advance of something.

mistake.correct: ahead of time / ahead of schedule (正確用法)

example: The mountain air is fresh and clean.
exampleZh: 山上的空氣清新乾淨。
explanation: The mixture of gases that surrounds the Earth.

mistake.correct: in the fresh air / fresh air (兩者皆可)

example: I have almost finished my homework.
exampleZh: 我幾乎完成了我的作業。
explanation: Very nearly but not completely.

mistake.correct: almost + 形容詞/副詞/動詞 (直接用)

example: She likes to study alone in the library.
exampleZh: 她喜歡獨自在圖書館學習。
explanation: Without other people present.

mistake.correct: alone / by herself (擇一使用)

example: We walked along the river for an hour.
exampleZh: 我們沿著河邊走了一個小時。
explanation: Moving in a line next to something.

mistake.correct: along + N / along with (一起)

example: She has already eaten dinner.
exampleZh: 她已經吃過晚飯了。
explanation: Before the time expected or before now.

mistake.wrong: She already has eaten. (語序錯誤)
mistake.correct: She has already eaten. (已經放在助動詞後)

example: I like English. I also enjoy math.
exampleZh: 我喜歡英語，我也喜歡數學。
explanation: In addition to what was said.

mistake.wrong: also I like math. (語序錯誤)
mistake.correct: I also like math. (also放在主動詞前)

example: Although it was raining, she went out.
exampleZh: 雖然在下雨，她還是出去了。
explanation: Despite the fact that something is true.

mistake.wrong: Although it rained, but she went. (不能加but)
mistake.correct: Although it rained, she went. (正確)

example: She always arrives on time.
exampleZh: 她總是準時到達。
explanation: At all times or on every occasion.

mistake.correct: She is always late. (always放be動詞後)

example: There are many animals in the zoo.
exampleZh: 動物園裡有很多動物。
explanation: A living thing that can move and feel.

mistake.correct: an animal / animals (兩者皆可)

example: Can I have another piece of cake?
exampleZh: 我可以再來一塊蛋糕嗎？
explanation: One more of the same kind.

mistake.correct: another one / another (直接用)

example: She walked around the park every morning.
exampleZh: 她每天早上繞公園散步。
explanation: On all sides of something.

mistake.correct: around + N (不加of)

example: Please put your phone away during class.
exampleZh: 上課時請把手機收起來。
explanation: To or at a distance from a place.

mistake.correct: go away / stay away from (正確)

example: She came back home late last night.
exampleZh: 她昨晚很晚才回家。
explanation: The rear part of something, or return.

mistake.correct: come back home (不加to)

example: Eating too much sugar is bad for your health.
exampleZh: 吃太多糖對你的健康有害。
explanation: Of poor quality or unpleasant.

mistake.correct: worse (比較級) / worst (最高級)

example: He kicked the ball into the goal.
exampleZh: 他把球踢進球門。
explanation: A round object used in sports.

mistake.correct: play ball / kick the ball (動作加the)

example: I need to go to the bank to deposit money.
exampleZh: 我需要去銀行存錢。
explanation: A place where money is kept.

mistake.correct: go to the bank (正確)

chinese: n. 基礎；底部 v. 以⋯為基礎
example: The base of the building is very strong.
exampleZh: 這棟建築的基礎非常堅固。
explanation: The bottom part or foundation of something.

mistake.correct: based on (依據) / based in (地點)

example: Taiwan has many beautiful landscapes.
exampleZh: 台灣有許多美麗的風景。
explanation: Very attractive or pleasing.

mistake.correct: beautiful / extremely beautiful (正確)

example: She stayed home because she was sick.
exampleZh: 她待在家裡因為她生病了。
explanation: For the reason that.

mistake.correct: because + 子句 / because of + N (正確)

example: Wash your hands before eating.
exampleZh: 吃飯前洗手。
explanation: Earlier than something else.

mistake.correct: before eating / before you eat (正確)

example: The library is behind the school.
exampleZh: 圖書館在學校後面。
explanation: At the back of something.

mistake.correct: behind + N (不加of)

example: I believe she will pass the exam.
exampleZh: 我相信她會通過考試。
explanation: To think something is true.

mistake.correct: I believe (正確)

example: The post office is between the bank and the park.
exampleZh: 郵局在銀行和公園之間。
explanation: In the space separating two things.

mistake.correct: between two things / among many things (正確)

example: Exercise is good for your body and mind.
exampleZh: 運動對你的身心都有益。
explanation: The physical structure of a person.

mistake.correct: my health / the health of my body (正確)

chinese: adj. 天生的 v. 出生（be born）
example: She was born in Taipei in 2008.
exampleZh: 她2008年出生於台北。
explanation: To come into the world through birth.

mistake.correct: She was born in 2008. (正確)

example: Both of them passed the test.
exampleZh: 他們兩個都通過了考試。
explanation: Used to refer to two people or things.

mistake.correct: Both of them are (複數動詞)

chinese: v. 打破；休息 n. 休息時間
example: Let's take a break after this chapter.
exampleZh: 學完這章後我們休息一下。
explanation: To separate into pieces, or a rest period.

mistake.correct: take a break / have a break (休息)

example: They are building a new school.
exampleZh: 他們正在建造一所新學校。
explanation: To construct something by putting parts together.

mistake.correct: build a house / build up confidence (累積信心)

example: Be careful not to burn yourself cooking.
exampleZh: 煮飯時小心不要燙傷自己。
explanation: To produce flames and heat.

mistake.correct: burned or burnt (美式用burned，英式用burnt)

example: She is too busy to talk right now.
exampleZh: 她現在太忙了無法說話。
explanation: Having a lot to do.

mistake.correct: busy doing / too busy to do (正確)

example: She took many photos with her new camera.
exampleZh: 她用她的新相機拍了很多照片。
explanation: A device used to take photographs.

mistake.wrong: take a photo with camera (少冠詞)
mistake.correct: take a photo with a camera / with her camera (正確)

example: She really cares about her students.
exampleZh: 她真的很關心她的學生。
explanation: To feel concern or look after someone.

mistake.wrong: care about doing (通常care about + N)
mistake.correct: care about + N / care for + N (正確)

example: Can you carry this box for me?
exampleZh: 你能幫我搬這個箱子嗎？
explanation: To hold and transport something.

mistake.correct: carry + N (搬運) / carry on (繼續)

example: She caught a cold last week.
exampleZh: 她上週感冒了。
explanation: To grab something moving, or get sick.

mistake.correct: catch a cold / get the flu (正確)

chinese: v. 導致；造成 n. 原因
example: Stress can cause health problems.
exampleZh: 壓力可能導致健康問題。
explanation: To make something happen.

mistake.correct: cause + N / cause someone to do (正確)

example: I am certain she will succeed.
exampleZh: 我確定她會成功。
explanation: Definite or sure about something.

mistake.correct: be certain about + N / certain that + 子句 (正確)

example: Don't miss this chance to improve.
exampleZh: 不要錯過這個進步的機會。
explanation: An opportunity or possibility.

mistake.correct: a chance to do (機會) / a chance of doing (可能性)

example: Please check your answers before submitting.
exampleZh: 提交前請檢查你的答案。
explanation: To examine something carefully.

mistake.correct: check + N (檢查) / check on someone (關心)

example: Every child deserves a good education.
exampleZh: 每個孩子都值得接受良好的教育。
explanation: A young human being.

mistake.correct: children (正確複數)

example: Taipei is a vibrant and modern city.
exampleZh: 台北是一個充滿活力的現代城市。
explanation: A large town with many people.

mistake.wrong: in a city of Taipei (錯誤)
mistake.correct: in the city of Taipei / in Taipei (正確)

example: Our English class starts at 8 am.
exampleZh: 我們的英語課上午8點開始。
explanation: A group of students or a lesson.

mistake.wrong: go to the class (一般上課)
mistake.correct: go to class / attend class (不加the)

example: Please keep your room clean.
exampleZh: 請保持你的房間整潔。
explanation: Free from dirt or to make something clean.

mistake.wrong: clean up the room (可以，更徹底)
mistake.correct: clean the room / clean up the room (兩者皆可)

chinese: adj. 清楚的；晴朗的 v. 清除
example: Please give a clear explanation.
exampleZh: 請給出清楚的解釋。
explanation: Easy to understand or see.

mistake.correct: make something clear / explain clearly (正確)

example: They climbed the mountain together.
exampleZh: 他們一起爬山。
explanation: To go up something using hands and feet.

mistake.correct: climb the mountain / climb up (正確)

example: The clock on the wall says 3 pm.
exampleZh: 牆上的時鐘顯示下午3點。
explanation: A device that shows the time.

mistake.correct: clock (牆上/桌上) / watch (手上)

example: She wore new clothes to the party.
exampleZh: 她穿著新衣服去參加派對。
explanation: Items worn to cover the body.

mistake.correct: clothes (複數) / a piece of clothing (一件)

example: Dark clouds appeared before the storm.
exampleZh: 暴風雨前出現了烏雲。
explanation: A mass of water vapor in the sky.

mistake.correct: a cloud / clouds (正確)

chinese: adj. 冷的 n. 感冒
example: Drink warm water when you have a cold.
exampleZh: 感冒時要喝溫水。
explanation: Having a low temperature, or an illness.

mistake.correct: catch a cold / have a cold (正確)

chinese: n. 顏色 v. 上色
example: What is your favorite color?
exampleZh: 你最喜歡的顏色是什麼？
explanation: The property of light that gives objects their appearance.

mistake.correct: color (美式) / colour (英式)

example: This sofa is very comfortable to sit on.
exampleZh: 這張沙發坐起來非常舒適。
explanation: Physically relaxed and at ease.

mistake.correct: feel comfortable (正確)

example: She works for a technology company.
exampleZh: 她在一家科技公司工作。
explanation: A business organization or companionship.

mistake.correct: work for a company / work at a company (正確)

example: Please complete the form carefully.
exampleZh: 請仔細填寫這份表格。
explanation: To finish something or having all parts.

mistake.correct: complete something (直接用)

example: She uses a computer for her work every day.
exampleZh: 她每天用電腦工作。
explanation: An electronic device for processing data.

mistake.correct: use a computer / use the computer (正確)

example: Please continue reading the next chapter.
exampleZh: 請繼續閱讀下一章。
explanation: To keep doing something without stopping.

mistake.correct: continue to do / continue doing (兩者皆可)

example: She learned to control her emotions.
exampleZh: 她學會了控制自己的情緒。
explanation: To manage or have power over something.

mistake.correct: control + N / have control over (正確)

chinese: v. 烹飪 n. 廚師
example: She loves to cook for her family.
exampleZh: 她喜歡為家人做飯。
explanation: To prepare food using heat.

mistake.correct: cook for someone / cook a meal (正確)

example: The bookstore is on the corner of the street.
exampleZh: 書店在街角。
explanation: The point where two lines or edges meet.

mistake.correct: in the corner (室內) / on the corner (街角)

example: How much does this book cost?
exampleZh: 這本書多少錢？
explanation: The price of something.

mistake.correct: cost + 金額 / the cost of (正確)

example: Every vote counts in an election.
exampleZh: 選舉中每一票都很重要。
explanation: To calculate numbers or be important.

mistake.correct: count + N (計算) / count on (依賴)

example: Taiwan is a beautiful island country.
exampleZh: 台灣是一個美麗的島嶼國家。
explanation: A nation or rural area.

mistake.wrong: in country (無冠詞，通常指農村)
mistake.correct: in the country (農村) / in a country (某國)

example: They have been a couple for five years.
exampleZh: 他們已經在一起五年了。
explanation: Two people in a relationship, or a few.

mistake.wrong: a couple of people is (複數概念)
mistake.correct: a couple of people are (複數動詞)

chinese: v. 覆蓋；涵蓋 n. 封面
example: The book covers many important topics.
exampleZh: 這本書涵蓋了很多重要主題。
explanation: To put something over or include.

mistake.correct: cover + N (涵蓋) / cover up (掩蓋)

chinese: v. 穿越；交叉 adj. 生氣的
example: Look both ways before you cross the road.
exampleZh: 過馬路前要左右看。
explanation: To go from one side to the other.

mistake.correct: cross the road (直接用)

chinese: n. 人群 v. 擠滿
example: A large crowd gathered in the square.
exampleZh: 廣場上聚集了一大群人。
explanation: A large number of people in one place.

mistake.correct: a crowd of people (people不加s)

example: She cried when she heard the sad news.
exampleZh: 她聽到悲傷的消息時哭了。
explanation: To produce tears or shout out.

mistake.correct: cry / cry out (大聲叫喊)

example: Would you like a cup of tea?
exampleZh: 你想要一杯茶嗎？
explanation: A small container for drinking.

mistake.correct: a cup of tea (正確)

example: She cut the vegetables for dinner.
exampleZh: 她切了晚餐的蔬菜。
explanation: To divide with a sharp tool.

mistake.correct: cut + N (切) / cut off (切斷) / cut down (削減)

example: It gets dark early in winter.
exampleZh: 冬天天黑得早。
explanation: Without much light or of a deep color.

mistake.correct: a dark color / dark + 顏色 (如dark blue)

example: The dead tree needs to be removed.
exampleZh: 那棵枯死的樹需要被移走。
explanation: No longer alive or not working.

mistake.correct: dead people / the dead (泛指死者)

chinese: v. 處理；交易 n. 協議
example: How do you deal with stress?
exampleZh: 你如何應對壓力？
explanation: To handle a situation or make a business agreement.

mistake.correct: deal with + N (正確)

example: The lake is very deep here.
exampleZh: 這裡的湖很深。
explanation: Extending far down or inward.

mistake.correct: deep (形容詞) / deeply (副詞，如deeply moved)

example: Success depends on hard work.
exampleZh: 成功取決於努力工作。
explanation: To rely on or be determined by.

mistake.correct: depend on (正確介系詞)

example: She designed the logo for the company.
exampleZh: 她為公司設計了標誌。
explanation: To plan and create something.

mistake.correct: design + N / design for + N (設計目的)

example: She studies at her desk every evening.
exampleZh: 她每天晚上在書桌前學習。
explanation: A piece of furniture for writing or working.

mistake.correct: at the desk (在書桌前工作)

example: Please pay attention to the details.
exampleZh: 請注意細節。
explanation: A small but important fact or feature.

mistake.correct: in detail (仔細地) / the details of (某事的細節)

example: Learning a new language is difficult but rewarding.
exampleZh: 學習新語言很困難但很有價值。
explanation: Not easy to do or understand.

mistake.wrong: it is difficult to doing (錯誤)
mistake.correct: it is difficult to do (正確)

example: Our family has dinner together every night.
exampleZh: 我們家每晚一起吃晚餐。
explanation: The main meal of the day.

mistake.wrong: have a dinner (通常不加冠詞)
mistake.correct: have dinner / eat dinner (正確)

example: Can you give me directions to the station?
exampleZh: 你能告訴我去車站的方向嗎？
explanation: The course along which something moves.

mistake.correct: give directions (指路時用複數)

example: Scientists discovered a new species.
exampleZh: 科學家發現了一個新物種。
explanation: To find something for the first time.

mistake.correct: discover + N (直接接受詞)

example: The distance between Taipei and Tainan is 300 km.
exampleZh: 台北到台南的距離是300公里。
explanation: The space between two points.

mistake.correct: a long distance / far away (正確)

example: Divide the pizza into eight equal pieces.
exampleZh: 把披薩分成八等份。
explanation: To separate into parts.

mistake.wrong: divide by (除以) vs divide into (分成)
mistake.correct: divide by 2 (除以2) / divide into 4 parts (分成4份)

example: Please close the door when you leave.
exampleZh: 離開時請把門關上。
explanation: A movable barrier at the entrance of a room.

mistake.correct: open the door / a door (視情況)

example: She loves to draw animals in her free time.
exampleZh: 她空閒時喜歡畫動物。
explanation: To create pictures with a pen or pencil.

mistake.correct: draw a picture / draw + N (正確)

example: She dreams of becoming a doctor.
exampleZh: 她夢想成為一名醫生。
explanation: A wish for the future or images during sleep.

mistake.correct: dream of doing / dream about doing (正確)

example: Drink at least 8 glasses of water a day.
exampleZh: 每天至少喝8杯水。
explanation: To swallow liquid.

mistake.correct: drink water every day (every day=副詞)

example: He drives to work every morning.
exampleZh: 他每天早上開車上班。
explanation: To operate a vehicle.

mistake.correct: drive home (不加to)

example: Don't drop your phone on the floor.
exampleZh: 不要把手機摔在地板上。
explanation: To fall or let something fall.

mistake.correct: drop (直接用) / drop out of (退出)

example: Please be quiet during the exam.
exampleZh: 考試期間請保持安靜。
explanation: Throughout the time of something.

mistake.correct: during + N (名詞) / while + 子句 (正確)

example: Each student has their own textbook.
exampleZh: 每個學生都有自己的課本。
explanation: Every one of two or more things.

mistake.correct: each of the students (正確)

example: She always wakes up early in the morning.
exampleZh: 她早上總是很早起床。
explanation: Before the usual or expected time.

mistake.correct: wake up early in the morning (正確)

example: We must protect the Earth from pollution.
exampleZh: 我們必須保護地球免受污染。
explanation: The planet we live on.

mistake.wrong: the Earth / Earth (大寫當專有名詞)
mistake.correct: the Earth (加冠詞) / Earth (不加冠詞，兩者皆可)

example: This test was easier than I expected.
exampleZh: 這次考試比我預期的容易。
explanation: Not difficult to do.

mistake.correct: feel easy / easily (副詞) (正確)

example: Don't stand too close to the edge of the cliff.
exampleZh: 不要站得太靠近懸崖邊緣。
explanation: The border of something or an advantage.

mistake.correct: on the edge of (在邊緣) / on edge (緊張)

example: You can take either bus to get there.
exampleZh: 你可以坐任一輛公車到那裡。
explanation: One or the other of two things.

mistake.wrong: either of them are (either接單數動詞)
mistake.correct: either of them is (正確)

example: Is there anything else I can help you with?
exampleZh: 還有其他我可以幫你的事嗎？
explanation: In addition or different.

mistake.correct: no one else's / someone else's (正確)

example: At the end of the day, kindness matters most.
exampleZh: 最終，善良是最重要的。
explanation: The final part of something.

mistake.correct: at the end of (某事的結尾) / in the end (最終)

example: Solar energy is clean and renewable.
exampleZh: 太陽能是乾淨且可再生的能源。
explanation: The power to do work or be active.

mistake.correct: energy (不可數) / a source of energy (能源)

example: I enjoy listening to music while studying.
exampleZh: 我喜歡一邊聽音樂一邊學習。
explanation: To take pleasure in something.

mistake.correct: enjoy doing (正確)

example: Please knock before you enter the room.
exampleZh: 進入房間前請先敲門。
explanation: To go into a place.

mistake.correct: enter the room (直接接地點)

example: We must protect the natural environment.
exampleZh: 我們必須保護自然環境。
explanation: The surroundings in which people live.

mistake.correct: the environment (自然環境) / environments (多種環境)

example: Everyone should have equal opportunities.
exampleZh: 每個人都應有平等的機會。
explanation: The same in size, value, or importance.

mistake.correct: equal (形容詞) / equally (副詞)

example: She reads books every evening before bed.
exampleZh: 她每天晚上睡前看書。
explanation: The time between late afternoon and bedtime.

mistake.correct: in the evening (固定搭配)

example: The school held a sports event last week.
exampleZh: 學校上週舉辦了體育活動。
explanation: Something that happens, especially planned.

mistake.correct: event (活動/事件) / incident (事故) / accident (意外)

example: Have you ever been to Japan?
exampleZh: 你曾經去過日本嗎？
explanation: At any time, or at all times.

mistake.wrong: Did you ever go (正確，一般過去式)
mistake.correct: Have you ever been (現在完成式) / Did you ever go (一般過去式) (兩者皆可)

example: She exercises every morning without fail.
exampleZh: 她每天早上都不間斷地運動。
explanation: Each one of a group.

mistake.correct: every student / each of the students (正確)

example: Everyone in the class passed the exam.
exampleZh: 班上每個人都通過了考試。
explanation: All people in a group.

mistake.correct: everyone is (正確)

example: She gave everything to achieve her goal.
exampleZh: 她傾盡全力實現她的目標。
explanation: All things or the most important thing.

mistake.correct: everything is (正確)

example: For example, apples and oranges are fruits.
exampleZh: 例如，蘋果和橘子都是水果。
explanation: Something used to show what something is like.

mistake.wrong: for example, + 完整句子 (需加逗號)
mistake.correct: For example, + 句子 (加逗號，正確)

example: Everyone came to the party except Tom.
exampleZh: 除了湯姆，每個人都來了派對。
explanation: Not including.

mistake.correct: except + N (不加of)

example: Regular exercise keeps you healthy.
exampleZh: 規律運動讓你保持健康。
explanation: Physical activity or a practice task.

mistake.correct: exercise (運動，不可數) / do exercises (做練習，可數)

example: I expect you to finish this by tomorrow.
exampleZh: 我期待你明天前完成這個。
explanation: To think something will happen.

mistake.correct: expect to + V / expect + O + to + V (正確)

example: The teacher explained the rule clearly.
exampleZh: 老師清楚地解釋了這個規則。
explanation: To make something clear and understandable.

mistake.correct: explain something to someone (正確語序)

example: She has beautiful brown eyes.
exampleZh: 她有美麗的棕色眼睛。
explanation: The organ of sight.

mistake.correct: eye contact / make eye contact (正確用法)

example: She faced many challenges in her career.
exampleZh: 她在職業生涯中面對許多挑戰。
explanation: The front of the head, or to deal with.

mistake.correct: face + N / face up to (勇於面對)

chinese: v. 跌落；下降 n. 秋天
example: Leaves fall from the trees in autumn.
exampleZh: 秋天樹葉從樹上落下。
explanation: To drop down or the season of autumn.

mistake.correct: fall (落下) / fall down (跌倒)

example: The school is not far from my house.
exampleZh: 學校離我家不遠。
explanation: At or to a great distance.

mistake.wrong: far away from here (可以，但多餘)
mistake.correct: far from here / far away (正確)

example: She runs very fast.
exampleZh: 她跑得很快。
explanation: Moving or happening quickly.

mistake.correct: fast (副詞，不加-ly)

example: My father is a doctor.
exampleZh: 我的父親是醫生。
explanation: A male parent.

mistake.wrong: my father's job is doctor (少冠詞)
mistake.correct: my father is a doctor (正確)

example: Only a few students got a perfect score.
exampleZh: 只有少數學生獲得滿分。
explanation: A small number of things.

mistake.wrong: few (沒幾個，負面) vs a few (有幾個，正面)
mistake.correct: few people came (來的人很少) / a few people came (有幾個人來)

example: She is an expert in the field of nutrition.
exampleZh: 她是營養領域的專家。
explanation: An open area or an area of knowledge.

mistake.wrong: in the fields of (多個領域)
mistake.correct: in the field of / in the area of (正確)

example: Please finish your homework before watching TV.
exampleZh: 看電視前請先完成作業。
explanation: To come to the end of something.

mistake.correct: finish doing (正確)

example: The fire spread quickly through the forest.
exampleZh: 火迅速蔓延到森林中。
explanation: The light and heat from burning.

mistake.wrong: catch a fire (少冠詞或去冠詞)
mistake.correct: catch fire (著火，不加冠詞)

example: She was the first student to finish the exam.
exampleZh: 她是第一個完成考試的學生。
explanation: Before all others in time or order.

mistake.correct: at first (起初) / for the first time (第一次)

example: Our classroom is on the third floor.
exampleZh: 我們的教室在三樓。
explanation: The surface of a room or level of a building.

mistake.correct: on the third floor (正確)

example: She gave her teacher a bouquet of flowers.
exampleZh: 她送給老師一束花。
explanation: The colorful part of a plant.

mistake.correct: a flower / flowers (兩者皆可)

example: Birds fly south for the winter.
exampleZh: 鳥兒冬天向南飛。
explanation: To move through the air.

mistake.correct: fly abroad / fly to Japan (正確)

example: Don't forget to call your parents.
exampleZh: 不要忘記打電話給你的父母。
explanation: To fail to remember something.

mistake.wrong: forget to do (未來事) vs forget doing (過去事)
mistake.correct: forget to lock (忘記去鎖) / forget locking (忘記鎖過了)

chinese: n. 表格；形式 v. 形成
example: Please fill in this form completely.
exampleZh: 請完整填寫這份表格。
explanation: A document to fill in or a shape.

mistake.correct: fill in a form / fill out a form (正確)

chinese: adj. 自由的；免費的 v. 釋放
example: The entrance to the museum is free today.
exampleZh: 今天博物館入場免費。
explanation: Not restricted or costing nothing.

mistake.correct: for free / free of charge (正確)

example: She prefers fresh vegetables to frozen ones.
exampleZh: 她更喜歡新鮮蔬菜而非冷凍的。
explanation: Recently made or not stale.

mistake.correct: fresh (形容詞) / freshly baked (剛烤好的)

example: Please sit in the front row.
exampleZh: 請坐在前排。
explanation: The forward-facing part of something.

mistake.correct: in front of + N (在⋯前面)

example: I am full after that big meal.
exampleZh: 吃了那頓大餐後我很飽。
explanation: Containing as much as possible.

mistake.correct: full of + N / full (飽了)

example: Learning English can be a lot of fun.
exampleZh: 學習英語可以很有趣。
explanation: Enjoyment or amusement.

mistake.correct: more fun (比較級，不加-er)

example: They played a board game after dinner.
exampleZh: 他們晚餐後玩了桌遊。
explanation: An activity done for fun or competition.

mistake.wrong: play a game of chess (可以，正式)
mistake.correct: play chess / play a chess game (正確)

example: She grows vegetables in her garden.
exampleZh: 她在花園裡種蔬菜。
explanation: A piece of land for growing plants.

mistake.correct: in the garden / in her garden (正確)

example: She received many gifts on her birthday.
exampleZh: 她生日時收到很多禮物。
explanation: Something given to someone as a present.

mistake.correct: a gift for + N/Ving (天賦) / a birthday gift (禮物)

example: I am glad to hear you are doing well.
exampleZh: 很高興聽到你一切都好。
explanation: Feeling happy or pleased.

mistake.correct: be glad to + V / be glad that + 子句 (正確)

example: Please drink a glass of water.
exampleZh: 請喝一杯水。
explanation: A hard transparent material or a drinking vessel.

mistake.correct: a glass of water (正確)

example: Global warming is a serious problem.
exampleZh: 全球暖化是一個嚴重的問題。
explanation: Relating to the whole world.

mistake.correct: global (形容詞) / globally (副詞)

example: She sat on the ground and rested.
exampleZh: 她坐在地上休息。
explanation: The surface of the earth.

mistake.correct: on the ground (正確)

chinese: n. 群體；組 v. 分組
example: She works in a group of five students.
exampleZh: 她在一個五人小組中工作。
explanation: A number of people or things together.

mistake.wrong: a group of students are (可以，但)
mistake.correct: a group of students is/are (兩者皆可)

example: Children grow quickly in their early years.
exampleZh: 孩子在早年成長得很快。
explanation: To increase in size or develop.

mistake.correct: grow up / grow into (成長為)

example: Can you guess what's inside the box?
exampleZh: 你能猜猜箱子裡有什麼嗎？
explanation: To estimate without being sure.

mistake.correct: guess + N / guess that + 子句 (正確)
